SNECKODOWNFALL-ACE_OF_WANDS.description:
Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain {AceOfWandsPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].{InCombat:|
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Debuff.}
SNECKODOWNFALL-ACE_OF_WANDS.title: Queen of Pentacles
SNECKODOWNFALL-AMASS.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain additional [gold]Block[/gold] equal to {IfUpgraded:show:twice the|the} total Energy cost of your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-AMASS.title: Amass
SNECKODOWNFALL-BEHOLD.title: Behold!
SNECKODOWNFALL-BELITTLE.description:
Enemy loses {InCombat:{HpLoss:diff()}|{HpLossExtra:diff()}} HP for each unique debuff they have.{InCombat:|
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Uncommon Debuff.}
SNECKODOWNFALL-BELITTLE.title: Belittle
SNECKODOWNFALL-BEYOND_ARMOR.title: Beyond Armor
SNECKODOWNFALL-BLUNDERBUS.title: Blunderbus
SNECKODOWNFALL-BLUNDER_GUARD.description: Whenever you play a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, gain {BlunderGuardBlockPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {BlunderGuardStrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-BLUNDER_GUARD.title: Blunder Guard
SNECKODOWNFALL-CHEAP_STOCK.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Muddle[/gold] the {IfUpgraded:show:{CheapStockPower:diff()} highest|highest} cost {CheapStockPower:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-CHEAP_STOCK.title: Cheap Stock
SNECKODOWNFALL-COBRA_COIL.title: Cobra Coil
SNECKODOWNFALL-COMBO_STRING.title: Combo String
SNECKODOWNFALL-COWER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Hole Up{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-COWER.title: Cower
SNECKODOWNFALL-CRIPPLING_POISON.title: Crippling Cloud
SNECKODOWNFALL-CRYSTAL_BOOMERANG.descrip:
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
If it's [gold]Offclass[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-CRYSTAL_BOOMERANG.selecti: Choose a card to put in your Hand.
SNECKODOWNFALL-CRYSTAL_BOOMERANG.title: Crystal Boomerang
SNECKODOWNFALL-DANGER_NOODLE.title: Danger Noodle
SNECKODOWNFALL-DECEPTION.title: Deception
SNECKODOWNFALL-DEFEND_SNECKO.title: Defend
SNECKODOWNFALL-DEFENSIVE_FLAIR.title: Defensive Flair
SNECKODOWNFALL-DICE_BLOCK.title: Dice Block
SNECKODOWNFALL-DICE_BOULDER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by {Increase:diff()} and its cost by {Energy:energyIcons()} this combat.
SNECKODOWNFALL-DICE_BOULDER.title: Dice Boulder
SNECKODOWNFALL-DICE_CRUSH.title: Dice Crush
SNECKODOWNFALL-DRAGONS_HOARD.title: Dragon's Hoard
SNECKODOWNFALL-FLASH_IN_THE_PAN.descript:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Discard your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Draw that many cards next turn.
SNECKODOWNFALL-FLASH_IN_THE_PAN.title: Flash in the Pan
SNECKODOWNFALL-GILDED_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Muddle[/gold] this, then return it to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-GILDED_SHIELD.title: Gilded Shield
SNECKODOWNFALL-GLITTERING_GAMBIT.title: Glittering Gambit
SNECKODOWNFALL-HOLE_UP.title: Hole Up
SNECKODOWNFALL-INERT_BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this costs more or equal to...
{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
{energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
{energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)}: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SNECKODOWNFALL-INERT_BLADE.title: Inert Blade
SNECKODOWNFALL-IRON_FANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SNECKODOWNFALL-IRON_FANG.title: Iron Fang
SNECKODOWNFALL-JACKPOT.title: Jackpot
SNECKODOWNFALL-LACERATE.description:
Apply {VenomPower:diff()} [gold]Venom[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Add a [gold]Crippling Cloud{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-LACERATE.title: Lacerate
SNECKODOWNFALL-LASER_EYES.title: Laser Eyes
SNECKODOWNFALL-LAST_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For each unique [gold]Strike[/gold] played this combat, deal once more.{InCombat:
(Hit {Hits:diff()} times)|}{InCombat:|
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Strike.}
SNECKODOWNFALL-LAST_STRIKE.title: Last Strike
SNECKODOWNFALL-LATCH_ON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add a [gold]Viper Essence[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-LATCH_ON.title: Latch On
SNECKODOWNFALL-LIL_GUARDIAN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], it plays itself after you play a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more.
SNECKODOWNFALL-LIL_GUARDIAN.title: Lil' Guardian
SNECKODOWNFALL-LUCKY_BREAK.title: Lucky Break
SNECKODOWNFALL-MAKESHIFT_BLADE.title: Makeshift Blade
SNECKODOWNFALL-MARKED_CARD.description:
[gold]Muddle[/gold] a card.
If it costs more than 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, its cost will be always reduced.
SNECKODOWNFALL-MARKED_CARD.title: Marked Card
SNECKODOWNFALL-MEDUSA.title: Medusa
SNECKODOWNFALL-MESMERIZE.title: Mesmerize
SNECKODOWNFALL-MINT_CONDITION.title: Mint Condition
SNECKODOWNFALL-MOCK_CHARACTER_CHOICE_CAR: {Characters.StringValue:cond:[gold]{Characters}[/gold]|The selected character}'s card will be added to your [gold]Gift[/gold] card pool.
SNECKODOWNFALL-MOCK_CHARACTER_CHOICE_SEC: {Characters.StringValue:cond:[gold]{Characters}[/gold]|The selected character}'s card will be added to your [gold]Gift[/gold] card pool.
SNECKODOWNFALL-MUDSHIELD.title: Mud Shield
SNECKODOWNFALL-NOPE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Select a card. If it belongs to a character then [gold]Transform[/gold] it, otherwise [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
SNECKODOWNFALL-NOPE.title: Nope
SNECKODOWNFALL-OTHERWORLDLY_SLASH.title: Otherworldly Slash
SNECKODOWNFALL-OVERWHELMING_PRESENCE.des: The first time you play an [gold]Offclass[/gold] card each turn, draw a card.
SNECKODOWNFALL-PERPETUAL_SERPENT.title: Perpetual Serpent
SNECKODOWNFALL-POISON_PARADISE.descripti: Whenever you trigger [gold]Overflow[/gold], apply {FountainPower:diff()} [gold]Venom[/gold] to a random enemy.
SNECKODOWNFALL-POISON_PARADISE.title: Fountain
SNECKODOWNFALL-POWER_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you play a [gold]Power[/gold], return this from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-POWER_SHOT.title: Power Shot
SNECKODOWNFALL-PURE_SNECKO.title: Pure Snecko
SNECKODOWNFALL-QUICK_BITE.title: Quick Bite
SNECKODOWNFALL-QUICK_MOVE.title: Quick Move
SNECKODOWNFALL-RAIN_OF_DICE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Muddle[/gold] a card, then add [gold]Rain of Dice{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-RAIN_OF_DICE.title: Rain of Dice
SNECKODOWNFALL-RESTOCK.description:
Discard your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards, then [gold]Muddle[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-RESTOCK.title: Restock
SNECKODOWNFALL-RISKY_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When [gold]Muddled[/gold], increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
SNECKODOWNFALL-RISKY_SWORD.title: Risky Sword
SNECKODOWNFALL-ROUNDABOUT_SWING.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards next turn.
SNECKODOWNFALL-ROUNDABOUT_SWING.selectio: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
SNECKODOWNFALL-ROUNDABOUT_SWING.title: Roundabout Swing
SNECKODOWNFALL-SAVE_FOR_LATER.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to {SaveForLaterPower:diff()} cards.
SNECKODOWNFALL-SAVE_FOR_LATER.title: Save For Later
SNECKODOWNFALL-SERPENTINE_SLEUTH.descrip:
Whenever you play a [gold]Power[/gold], gain {SubroutinePower:energyIcons()}.
{InCombat:|[gold]Gift[/gold]: Rare Power.}
SNECKODOWNFALL-SERPENTINE_SLEUTH.title: Serpentine Sleuth
SNECKODOWNFALL-SERPENTSCALE.title: Serpentscale
SNECKODOWNFALL-SERPENTS_NEST.description:
Whenever you play a [gold]Power[/gold], deal {SerpentsNestPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.{InCombat:|
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Uncommon Power.}
SNECKODOWNFALL-SERPENTS_NEST.title: Serpent's Nest
SNECKODOWNFALL-SERPENT_BOTTLE.title: Discount Sale
SNECKODOWNFALL-SERPENT_IDOL.description: Choose 1 of {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Offclass[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 0 this turn.
SNECKODOWNFALL-SERPENT_IDOL.title: Serpent Idol
SNECKODOWNFALL-SERPENT_MIND.description:
At the end of your turn, gain {SerpentMindPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each unique card color played this turn.{InCombat:|
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Rare.}
SNECKODOWNFALL-SERPENT_MIND.title: Exotic Form
SNECKODOWNFALL-SLITHER_THROUGH.title: Slither Through
SNECKODOWNFALL-SNAKE_EYES.description:
This turn, your next {SnakeEyesPower:diff()} [gold]Offclass[/gold] {SnakeEyesPower:plural:card is|cards are} played twice.{InCombat:|
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Rare Skill.}
SNECKODOWNFALL-SNAKE_EYES.title: Snake Eyes
SNECKODOWNFALL-SNEK_BITE.title: Snek Bite
SNECKODOWNFALL-SOUL_DRAW.description: Add {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Offclass[/gold] cards to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. They gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-SOUL_DRAW.title: Soul Draw
SNECKODOWNFALL-SOUL_EXCHANGE.title: Soul Exchange
SNECKODOWNFALL-SOUL_ROLL.title: Soul Roll
SNECKODOWNFALL-STRIKE_SNECKO.title: Strike
SNECKODOWNFALL-TAIL_WHIP.title: Tail Whip
SNECKODOWNFALL-THROWING_CARDS.descriptio:
Add X copies of [gold]FTL{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SNECKODOWNFALL-THROWING_CARDS.title: Throwing Cards
SNECKODOWNFALL-TOOTH_AND_CLAW.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Shiv{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each unique card color in your [gold]Hand[/gold].{InCombat:|
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Uncommon.}{InCombat:
(Add {Colors:diff()} {Colors:plural:Shiv|Shivs})|}
SNECKODOWNFALL-TOOTH_AND_CLAW.title: Tooth And Claw
SNECKODOWNFALL-TRASH_CAN.description: At the end of your turn, you may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
SNECKODOWNFALL-TRASH_CAN.title: Trash Can
SNECKODOWNFALL-TRASH_TO_TREASURE.descrip:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
Gain Energy equal to its cost.{IfUpgraded:hide:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].|}
SNECKODOWNFALL-TRASH_TO_TREASURE.title: Trash to Treasure
SNECKODOWNFALL-TSUNAMI.title: Tsunami
SNECKODOWNFALL-TYPHOON_FANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Overflow[/gold]: This turn, whenever you trigger [gold]Overflow[/gold], play a copy of [gold]Typhoon Fang{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-TYPHOON_FANG.title: Typhoon Fang
SNECKODOWNFALL-UNENDING_SUPPLY.descripti: At the start of your turn, add {UnendingSupplyPower:diff()} random [gold]Offclass[/gold] {UnendingSupplyPower:plural:card|cards} to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-UNENDING_SUPPLY.title: Unending Supply
SNECKODOWNFALL-VIPER_ESSENCE.title: Viper Essence
SNECKODOWNFALL-WHACK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Hole Up{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-WHACK.title: Whack!
SNECKODOWNFALL-WIDE_ANGLE.title: Wide Angle
SNECKODOWNFALL-WIDE_STING.title: Wide Sting
